narrative:
Mayfield Village-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 689 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
